items.name: Bronze Crown of Brilliance 2026
items.description:
You're a formidable opponent! Earn this crown by placing 11th to 25th on the leaderboards during NPC Champions Challenge 2026!
Owning this item will give you the NPC Champions Bronze 26' gun. Be sure to have your inventory public to use!

items.name: Looking Pedro
items.description:
let's take a look...

Based on Pedro from the Smili comic!
Came out of Smili UGC's Thanking Gift.

items.name: Golden Stubby Frog Pal
items.description:
I ribbit you! ❤️

Its original owner proved their worth by ranking in the Silly Simon Says top 100 global leaderboards in April'26. 

Original Stubby Frog Pal: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/87311005421342

For more silly accessories check out the Nomo Falls Store: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?CatalogContext=1&Category=1&CreatorName=nomo+falls&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=1

Made by Jaunty
